items.name: Census [TIGER]
items.notes: Verified live on original URL

items.name: USDA [Economic Research Agency]
items.notes: ERS migrated to ArcGIS Enterprise (v12). gisportal.ers.usda.gov

items.name: DOI-USGS [National Gap Analysis Program]
items.notes: PAD-US data moved to ArcGIS Online. Also PAD-US Data Explorer at maps.usgs.gov/padusdataexplorer/

items.name: DHS-FEMA [Services]
items.notes: FEMA migrated to gis.fema.gov (v11.5). NFHL at hazards.fema.gov. Old endpoint HTTP 410

items.name: DOC-NOAA [NGDC]
items.notes: Verified live on original URL

items.name: DOC-NOAA [National Climate Data Center]
items.notes: Verified live on original URL

items.name: DOC-NOAA [National Geophysical Data Center]
items.notes: Verified live on original URL

items.name: DOC-NOAA [Maritime Boundaries]
items.notes: Verified live on original URL

items.name: DOC-NOAA [National Weather and River Gauges]
items.notes: NWS migrated to mapservices.weather.noaa.gov (v11.3). River gauges under water/

items.name: DOC-NOAA [Multipurpose Marine Cadstre]
items.notes: Moved to coast.noaa.gov ArcGIS Server (v11.5). Also hub.marinecadastre.gov

items.name: DOD-USACE [Army Corps]
items.notes: USACE moved to ArcGIS Hub. Also geospatial.sec.usace.army.mil/server/

items.name: DOE [Energy Information Agency]
items.notes: EIA moved to atlas.eia.gov (US Energy Atlas, ArcGIS Hub)

items.name: DOE [National Energy Technology Laboratory]
items.notes: NETL migrated to arcgis.netl.doe.gov (v11.x)

items.name: DOEd [Education]
items.notes: No public ArcGIS server found for Department of Education

items.name: DOI-BLM [ePlanning]
items.notes: Verified live on original URL

items.name: DOI-BLM [Landscape]
items.notes: Consolidated into main BLM GIS at gis.blm.gov

items.name: DOI-BOEM
items.notes: Moved from boemre.gov to boem.gov (v11.3)

items.name: DOI-BOEM [Ocean Energy]
items.notes: Merged into BOEM main GIS at gis.boem.gov

items.name: DOI-NPS
items.notes: HTTPS works (v11.5). Upgrade from HTTP

items.name: DOI-NPS [IMGIS]
items.notes: Consolidated into mapservices.nps.gov

items.name: DOI-NPS [NPScape]
items.notes: HTTPS works (v11.5). Upgrade from HTTP

items.name: DOI-USFWS [Critical Habitat]
items.notes: Moved to ArcGIS Online

items.name: DOI-USFWS [Environmental Conservation Online System]
items.notes: ecos.fws.gov website functions but no public ArcGIS REST endpoint

items.name: DOI-USFWS [FWSCadastral]
items.notes: HTTP 502. No replacement public endpoint found

items.name: DOI-USFWS [Wetlands]
items.notes: Wetlands data moved to fwsprimary.wim.usgs.gov (v10.81). Wetlands, Riparian, HUC services

items.name: DOI-USGS [HDDS]
items.notes: HTTP 403. Replaced by hddsexplorer.usgs.gov web app. No public REST endpoint

items.name: DOI-USGS [National Geologic Map]
items.notes: NGMDB migrating. Geologic map data on AGOL

items.name: DOI-USGS [Geosciences and Environmental Change Science Center]
items.notes: HTTP 500. File downloads at rmgsc.cr.usgs.gov/outgoing/ but no active REST endpoint

items.name: DOI-USGS [High Resolution Imagery]
items.notes: High res imagery moved to imagery.nationalmap.gov (v11.3). USGSNAIPImagery, USGSNAIPPlus

items.name: DOI-USGS [The National Map - Basemaps]
items.notes: Verified live on original URL

items.name: DOI-USGS [The National Map - Raster]
items.notes: Raster basemap services moved to basemap.nationalmap.gov (v11.3)

items.name: DOI-USGS [The National Map - Services]
items.notes: Vector services moved to carto.nationalmap.gov (v11.3). Contours, geonames, govunits, structures

items.name: DOI-USGS [Wildfire.gov]
items.notes: Wildfire data migrated to Wildfire EGP portal. Also AGOL at services.arcgis.com/jIL9msH9OI208GCb

items.name: DOT [Research and Innovative Technology Administration]
items.notes: DOT consolidated to geo.dot.gov (v11.5). Also fragis.fra.dot.gov for FRA

items.name: EPA [Geodata]
items.notes: Consolidated into EPA Environmental Dataset Gateway (EDG) (v11.4)

items.name: EPA [Environmental Data Gateway]
items.notes: Verified live on original URL

items.name: EPA [MyEnviroment]
items.notes: MyEnvironment decommissioned. Services merged into EDG

items.name: EPA [Office of Water]
items.notes: HTTPS works (v11.3). WATERS, NHDPlus, OW services available

items.name: EPA [EnviroAtlas]
items.notes: HTTPS works (v11.3). Also enviroatlas-epa.hub.arcgis.com

items.name: EPA [Environmental Justice]
items.notes: EJSCREEN data merged into EDG. Domain dead (NXDOMAIN)

items.name: ESRI [Federal Data Services]
items.notes: Verified live on original URL

items.name: ESRI [Imagery]
items.notes: Imagery consolidated into services.arcgisonline.com. World_Imagery available

items.name: ESRI [Conservation]
items.notes: ESRI Conservation public server discontinued. Program now provides software grants

items.name: HUD
items.notes: Verified live on original URL

items.name: Nature Conservancy
items.notes: Moved to TNC ArcGIS Online organization

items.name: USDA-NRCS [Imagery]
items.notes: NRCS geoservices. Also APFO at gis.apfo.usda.gov via HTTPS still works

items.name: USDA-NRCS [Easements]
items.notes: NRCS GDG decommissioned Mar 2026. Merged into main NRCS geoservices

items.name: Nature Conservancy [LandScope]
items.notes: Data moved to NatureServe ArcGIS Open Data Hub

items.name: HUD [eGIS]
items.notes: HTTPS works (v10.71). Folders: affh, affht, cart, cpdmaps, gotit, hrl, opendata, pmt, tdat

items.name: DOI-USGS [Federal Geographic Data Committee]
items.notes: commons.wim.usgs.gov dead. FGDC services discontinued

items.name: DOC-NOAA [Coastal Flooding]
items.notes: Coastal flooding data moved to coast.noaa.gov (v11.5). CFEM Flood Hazard Composite

items.name: USDA-USFS
items.notes: USFS migrated from .fed.us to .usda.gov. Also fsgisx01, fsgisx02 servers
